LanguageData.ExtractorNoInsectBlood: Pawn does not match the configured target criteria.
LanguageData.ExtractorNoRequiredOrgans: Pawn does not have the required organs for extraction.
LanguageData.RHF_ComplexLooters_LetterText: Hunter scouts have been spotted near the ancient complex. They appear to be after supplies, not your people — for now.
LanguageData.RHF_GiftPayment_LetterText_WithSBD: The Reptile Hunters have accepted your delivery of {TOTAL} prisoner(s). {QUALIFYING} met their specimen criteria. A payment of {SBD} dose(s) of SBD and {TOTAL} dose(s) of drug medicine has arrived by drop pod.
LanguageData.RHF_GiftPayment_LetterText_NoSBD: The Reptile Hunters have accepted your delivery of {TOTAL} prisoner(s). None met their specimen criteria. A payment of {TOTAL} dose(s) of drug medicine has arrived by drop pod.
LanguageData.RHF_Settings_MinPawnsForBossRaid: Min. colonists for greatest hunter raid
